title: Gantt retroplanning

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I have a question about the use of Monday dependencies functionnality.

image1473×595 89.5 KB

Here in my case I suceeded to build dependencies on dates so that I only have to enter the dates for my first tasks, and all the other tasks dates are automatically calculated according to dependencies (column “Dépend de”).

Do you know if it is possible to do the other way ? For example I put the date of the last task in my planning, and with dependencies it calculates all the dates for tasks and give me the dates when I should launch the project (as a retroplanning) ?

It would be very useful for the following example : when we want to open a new industrial site, we have only the delivering date, so with the retroplanning we know when to effectively start the building of the site (6 months before for instance).

Thank you for your help, have a nice day,

Corentin
